title: Syrian Lamb Kibbeh Dumplings
description: A traditional Syrian dish featuring flavorful lamb dumplings served with a side of tangy sauce.

ingredients.name: Spices
ingredients.amount: 1 teaspoon, ground cumin, 1 teaspoon, ground coriander

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the lamb, crumbled day-old bread, chopped onion, ground cumin, ground coriander, salt, and black pepper. Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Add the all-purpose flour and water to the mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the dumplings until they are golden brown on both sides and cooked through.
Serve the dumplings hot with a side of tangy sauce (such as a yogurt-based sauce or a tomato-based sauce).
